rationale: Career consists entirely of non-technical roles (Business Analyst, Graphic Designer, Marketing Manager) at fictional honeypot companies (Wayne Enterprises, Dunder Mifflin) and Wipro IT services, with zero ML, IR, or engineering production experience.

Software engineer with 6yr at CRED (product company) brings solid backend/cloud fundamentals, but AI/ML engagement is entirely self-learner level (OpenAI API, small RAG side project) with no production embeddings, retrieval, or ranking work.
Sole role is Operations Manager at Initech (fictional company) with a career summary describing marketing/demand-gen work and no engineering or ML experience whatsoever.

Career at Mindtree (IT services) and Stark Industries (fictional company) is entirely frontend/.NET/DevOps with no ML or IR work; the advanced Pinecone skill claim (26 months) is inconsistent with all role descriptions and appears to be keyword inflation.

Java Developer with 2.1yr entirely at Infosys (IT services) in full-stack web development; skills are Salesforce CRM, Image Classification, and Photoshop with no IR, ranking, or production ML experience.
Entire 14yr career is in HR management and business analyst roles at fictional companies (Pied Piper, Dunder Mifflin) and Wipro IT services with no engineering or ML production work.
Accountant/Project Manager/Customer Support career at multiple fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Wayne Enterprises, Pied Piper) and Wipro with no engineering, ML, or IR experience.

Mechanical/Civil Engineer and Sales Executive career at fictional Initech and Wayne Enterprises plus Wipro IT services with no ML or IR production experience, despite an M.S. in AI from a tier_3 institution.

7.7yr career spanning Android mobile dev, QA, and full-stack web at Swiggy (real product company) and fictional firms; AI/ML engagement is self-learner only with no production IR, embeddings, or ranking work.

Advanced hands-on skills in Sentence Transformers (27mo), Elasticsearch (43mo), and LLM fine-tuning signal genuine IR/ML depth, but the entire 4.6yr career is at Wipro (IT services only) in a Computer Vision role — both explicit negative signals per the JD — with no evidence of production retrieval or ranking systems shipped at a product company.
